question: Did the founder of the company that currently owns National Storage Affiliates graduate from the university that plays its home football games at the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum?

chain.fact: Public Storage is the current owner of National Storage Affiliates.
B. Wayne Hughes is the founder of Public Storage.
B. Wayne Hughes graduated from the University of Southern California (USC).
The USC Trojans play their home games at the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum.

role_reference: the company that currently owns National Storage Affiliates
article_title: Public Storage to buy National Storage Affiliates in $10.5 billion deal | Reuters
event_title: Which companies will be acquired before 2027?
